Home.subtitle: Every single strand of your hair is valuable to us, we are here to meet your expectations!
Home.service1Desc: Scientific analysis and personalized hair care therapies to help you achieve healthy, glowing hair and stop hair loss...
Home.service2Desc: Our experts design the most suitable hair style for your facial features, age, and lifestyle. Meet our customized, breathable, and 100% natural-looking prosthetic hair systems.
Home.service3Desc: With our medical infrastructures developed specifically for hair loss types suitable for all ages and genders; we offer safe and permanent solutions that you can comb, do sports, and swim with.
Home.service4Desc: Our systems, prepared using the highest segment 100% real human hair containing no synthetic materials, provide a flawless experience indistinguishable from your own hair.
Home.service5Desc: With our professional team, competent in their field and closely following innovative hair trends; we provide you with the highest level of comfort and confidence in every step from the first analysis to your periodic maintenance.
Home.service6Desc: All fixing solutions, tapes, and care products we use in our applications are dermatologically tested, FDA approved, and fully compatible medical products with your skin.
Home.campaignDesc: Do not forget to follow our Instagram account for campaigns and details @usaksacprotez

Home.appProcessIntro: As Uşak Hair Prosthesis, we offer a fully personalized, painless, and medical-standard process in the journey of our guests experiencing hair loss to regain their self-confidence. Here are the 5 basic steps we follow for you to get the hair of your dreams:
Home.step1Desc: Our process begins with a detailed Trichological Hair Analysis in our clinic. Our experts share with you the alternatives suitable for your scalp, hair loss type, and facial features. Your expectations are listened to, and the method that will provide you with the most natural look is determined.
Home.step2Desc: An exact anatomical mold (measurement) of your head structure is taken. This step is the most critical stage for the prosthesis to fit your head perfectly and create a natural hairline. By analyzing the current color, thickness, wave, and growth direction of your hair, an order is placed with our laboratories abroad.
Home.step3Desc: 100% natural human hair is hand-processed one by one onto a breathable, anti-allergic thin unit (infrastructure) prepared according to the mold taken. The exit angles of the hair are placed with special knotting techniques to follow the same direction as your natural hair.
Home.step4Desc: When the prepared unit arrives, it is fixed to your skin using medical solutions and skin-friendly special medical tapes in our center. Then the most exciting part begins: Our expert hairdressers cut and style the prosthetic hair to perfectly integrate with your own hair and create the image of your dreams.
Home.step5Desc: After the application is finished, how to wash, comb your hair, and what you need to pay attention to in your daily life are explained in detail by our experts. To extend the life of your prosthesis and maintain its hygiene, you are provided to have your routine maintenance (hygiene cleaning and re-fixing) done by visiting our studio periodically every 3-4 weeks.

Pages.nedirP1: Prosthetic hair is one of the most preferred, reliable, and natural hair restoration systems for those experiencing hair loss or desiring fuller hair.
Pages.nedirP2: we design this application by determining your most suitable hairline and taking a completely customized medical mold. Our systems, produced from 100% real human hair, are prepared with the world's most advanced technologies. It is obtained by processing hair exactly matching your own hair character (color, wave, thickness) one by one onto an air and water permeable, breathable special micro-porous infrastructure.
Pages.nedirP3: One of the biggest advantages of prosthetic hair is that it can be applied without damaging your own hair underneath and without requiring any surgical intervention (incision, needle). The fixatives and medical tapes we use are anti-allergic products specially developed for sensitive skin.
Pages.nedirP4: Prosthetic hair has an extremely light and comfortable structure; it does not create a feeling of weight on your head and gives you a completely natural feeling. Just like your own hair, you can blow-dry it and style it as you wish. You will not experience any restrictions in your daily life; you can do sports that require effort, and you can easily go into the sea or pool.
Pages.nedirP5: The first step in prosthetic hair design is very important. The information you provide about your lifestyle, profession, expectations, and your dream hairstyle during your meeting with our experts allows us to get to know you better. In this way, we can design the most comfortable and natural prosthetic hair that will perfectly suit your face and style.
Pages.nedirP6: No aesthetic touch can change a person's appearance as dramatically and positively as their hair. Especially if you have lost a large part of your hair... As Uşak Hair Prosthesis, we help you regain your self-confidence with these systems that instantly increase your quality of life. With years of experience, we are proud to witness this wonderful change and happiness in the lives of countless customers. Are you ready to renew and start life again?
Pages.kimlerTitle: Who is Prosthetic Hair Suitable For?
Pages.kimlerP1: First of all, we perform a hair and scalp analysis on those who apply to us for prosthetic hair. In this way, we gain information about the causes of hair loss and develop the most suitable solution for you.
Pages.kimlerP1Strong: our priority is to save your own hair. Therefore, it is important which methods are suitable for you before the prosthesis.
Pages.kimlerP2: If you are at an early stage for prosthetic hair, we try to slow down hair loss with special therapies. If the hair is not going to get better, we examine whether the scalp is available for prosthetic hair. If suitable, we decide which hairstyle and type to determine. We make a special study for you with many different methods such as prosthetic hair alone or medical infrastructure hair prosthesis.
Pages.kimlerP3: Intervening before completely losing the hair provides a great advantage for users. In some cases, hair loss can be stopped, sometimes slowed down. Many people do not want to make a radical change in their appearance after losing a large part of their hair due to the reactions they will receive from the outside. Therefore, they approach prostheses and other systems hesitantly. The role of early intervention is also very important here.
Pages.kimlerP4: Hair problems experienced by women are both more and different compared to hair problems experienced by men. Due to hair structure, hair transplantation in women falls below expectations and is not preferred. As Uşak Hair Prosthesis, we solve an important problem with prosthetic hair types specific to women. We break new ground with brand new medical hair systems applied without shaving the hair.
Pages.kimlerP5: In cases of skin disorders or hair loss due to external factors, we respond quickly to your needs. We prepare specially produced hair systems in any color and hairstyle suitable for the individual's own hair structure.
Pages.kimlerH3_1: Who Cannot Have Prosthetic Hair Applied?
Pages.kimlerP6: Prosthetic hair can be applied to anyone who needs it. In the area with an open wound, the application should be done under the guidance of doctors. We work together with doctors in sensitive situations such as open wounds. We make designs suitable for these conditions where the prosthesis can be easily attached and removed. We apply special medical prosthetic hair for people experiencing advanced skin disorders.
Pages.kimlerP7: Developments in the medical world ensure the widespread use of hybrid hair systems. Especially in hair transplantation, if there is not enough hair in the donor area of the head, this area is supported by prosthetic hair. In all types of alopecia, such as ringworm, prosthetic hair gives definitive results.
Pages.kimlerH3_2: Things to Know Before Ordering Prosthetic Hair
Pages.kimlerP8: Since prosthetic hair is custom designed, we need to have detailed information about you. It is very important for us to know your lifestyle, skin type, hair condition, desired hairstyle, budget, and expectations from prosthetic hair. Because our goal is not just to sell prosthetic hair, but to enable you to have the hair of your dreams.
Pages.kimlerH3_3: Things to Consider When Using Prosthetic Hair
Pages.kimlerP9: Prosthetic hair needs care just like your own hair. Just as you do your personal care, make sure your prosthetic hair is clean and well-groomed. In particular, the cosmetic products you use must be suitable for the hair prosthesis. You can get detailed information and support from our experts regarding the care of prosthetic hair and the products to be used.
Pages.kimlerH3_4: What is the Lifespan of Prosthetic Hair?
Pages.kimlerP10: Since it is produced custom-made with many different models and designs, there are hair prostheses whose usage period varies from 1 month to 3 years. The lifespan of prosthetic hair varies according to the budget, expectation, and hairstyle. We want to ensure you use your hair for a long time by offering the highest quality product and service suitable for you. You can extend the life of the prosthesis by using your hair as recommended by our experts.
Pages.kadinP1: Hair is one of the most important complements of beauty and self-confidence for every woman. Whether long or short, wavy or straight; having full and healthy hair is every woman's dream. For this reason, hair loss or thinning can be a difficult process to accept and emotionally exhausting for women.
Pages.kadinP2: Hair loss in women can be caused by many different reasons. Genetic predisposition, hormonal changes after pregnancy, stress, malnutrition, wrong cosmetic product use, or incorrect hairdressing procedures can trigger hair loss. In addition, disorders such as alopecia areata (ringworm) or severe treatment processes such as chemotherapy and radiotherapy can also lead to hair loss. Whatever the reason, no woman has to submit to hair loss.
Pages.kadinP3: we are stopping hair loss from being a destiny. Regardless of its size or cause, we offer natural and flawless results with prosthetic hair systems we specially designed for women. These units, which are applied completely painlessly without any surgical intervention, are prepared by taking personal measurements. It can be applied to regional hair thinning or the entire hair if you wish. We also have types with a special medical infrastructure that do not irritate the scalp during sensitive processes such as chemotherapy and radiotherapy.
Pages.kadinP4: Prosthetic hair we produce for women does not create any difficulty or restriction in daily use. You can use it safely and comfortably as if it were your own hair during intense sports activities, swimming, or taking a shower. When you come to our Uşak Hair Prosthesis center, you can determine the most correct and suitable product for you by detailing your lifestyle to our experts. With our many different prosthetic hair types to suit your budget and our regular maintenance services, all you need to do is take the first step to completely change your life by getting the flawless hair of your dreams.
Pages.cocukP1: Children are in the most sensitive periods of their physical and spiritual development. In their world, appearance is of great importance for adaptation to social life and self-confidence development. Hair loss or balding can deeply affect a child's psychology, causing them to withdraw in school life or among friends and experience a lack of self-confidence.
Pages.cocukP2: Hair loss during childhood; can occur due to conditions such as alopecia (ringworm), genetic factors, scars resulting from accidents, or compulsory medical treatments such as chemotherapy and radiotherapy. In order for children to overcome this difficult process with minimum psychological damage, the naturalness and comfort of the solution offered to them plays a major role as well as the approach of the parents.
Pages.cocukP3: for us, it is more valuable than anything else for our little heroes to regain the smile on their faces. The hair systems we specially design for children are produced entirely from materials suitable for their sensitive skin structures, anti-allergic, and having a 100% medical infrastructure. These prostheses, specially designed to adapt to the active world of children, are applied painlessly without any surgical intervention.
Pages.cocukP4: The children's prosthetic hair systems we apply do not pose any obstacle to their school life, playtime, or sports activities. Even in daily activities such as sweating, running, swimming, and taking a shower, it offers a completely natural use, giving the feeling that it is their own hair. With these systems prepared in exact harmony with your child's hair color, strand, and head structure, it is very easy to ensure that they look at life with confidence and joy again with the assurance of Uşak Hair Prosthesis.
Pages.analizP1: is a detailed trichological application where we evaluate the current condition of your hair and scalp with digital and scientific methods and diagnose possible problems early. Just like the periodic tests we undergo to protect our general body health, a hair check-up plays a critical role in preventing hair loss and selecting the most suitable solution (care or prosthetic hair) for you. Scientific and numerical data obtained as a result of trichological analyses offer a perfect roadmap to our experts in the procedures to be applied.
Pages.analizP2: Just as we undergo health screenings to prevent diseases, hair problems are controlled more easily and effectively the earlier they are diagnosed. Thanks to the advanced microscopic digital analysis (trichoscope) devices we use in our Uşak Hair Prosthesis center, we examine details that cannot be seen with the naked eye down to the smallest detail.
Pages.analizH3_1: What is Examined in Detailed Analysis?
Pages.analizP3: Thanks to this modern analysis process, which has no harm or side effects on your hair, we obtain the following data:
Pages.analizLi1: Sebum (oil) balance on the scalp and condition of the pores
Pages.analizLi2: Keratin level and sensitivity level on the scalp
Pages.analizLi3: General health of the vessels feeding the hair follicles
Pages.analizLi4: Wear, thinning, and breakage rates in the hair strand
Pages.analizLi5: Hair growth cycle, shedding phase, and hair mass index
Pages.analizLi6: Moisture - pH ratio in hair and scalp and type of dandruff
Pages.analizP4: These detailed medical data allow us to determine the main source of hair loss or breakage. Seeing exactly where you are in the hair cycle is our most important guide in determining which method will be more efficient for you during the solution phase of the problem.
Pages.analizP5: Anyone who suspects "Is my hair falling out too much lately?" should definitely have a hair check-up without wasting time. Unfortunately, when hair loss is noticed with the naked eye, a large part of the hair may have already been lost. If you see more hair strands than before on your pillow, in the shower cabin, or while combing your hair, you should consult without wasting time with
Pages.analizP6: In addition to this, conditions such as unexplained itching, excessive oiliness or dryness on your scalp, coin-sized regional shedding, loss of natural elasticity of the hair and dullness are serious stimuli that should not be ignored. All these may be a simple sign of stress, or they may be the beginning of a problem that will lead to permanent hair loss in the future.
Pages.analizP7: The healthier and more balanced your body is, the more vibrant and strong your hair will be. Every small change you notice in your hair is of great importance to us. We are always by your side with our professional team to address all your concerns about your hair, to stop hair loss in its early stage, or to accurately determine your prosthetic hair needs and offer your hair the value it deserves.
Pages.urunH3_1: Discover the True Potential of Your Hair
Pages.urunP1: The first rule of having healthy, thick, and vibrant hair is to provide them with the right care they need. Using clinically tested quality care products that are perfectly compatible with your hair structure and staying away from heavy chemical applications that damage the hair is the strongest foundation of your anti-hair loss fight.
Pages.urunH3_2: What Is Your Scalp Telling You?
Pages.urunP2: The current condition of your scalp gives you very important clues about your general hair health. Ordinary care done with hearsay information or wrong cosmetic products can cause irreversible damage by disrupting the natural flora of the scalp over time instead of benefiting your hair strands.
Pages.urunP3: Professional care products that are perfectly compatible with the biological structure of your hair should not cause itching, dandruff, excessive oiliness, dryness, or sensitivity on the scalp. It is essential that cleansing products purify the hair without tiring it and deeply nourish the roots. In order to prevent serious problems such as shedding, lifelessness, dulling, or breaking and to extend the life of the hair, medical and cosmeceutical products with clinically tested effectiveness and proven reliability should definitely be preferred.
Pages.urunP4: we offer you elite product series developed in the most distinguished laboratories of America and Europe, which have proven quality worldwide, in order to slow down hair loss, support new hair formation, and permanently prevent scalp disorders in our clinic. These unique care products, free of sulfates and parabens, dermatologically tested, create maximum comfort and visible satisfaction even on the most sensitive scalps.
Pages.urunH3_4: How Will You Choose the Right Product?
Pages.urunP5: In order to pinpoint the most accurate and most effective product for your hair structure, genetic hair loss tendency, and special condition, we first recommend you have a
Pages.urunP5Strong: accompanied by our experts in our center.
Pages.urunP6: Thanks to this detailed analysis, which can even detect microscopic problems invisible to the naked eye (clogged pores, sebum imbalance, etc.), we clearly find what exactly your hair and scalp are "hungry" for. After this analysis, you can safely and pleasantly start using our premium care products that will directly meet the real need of your hair without wasting time with trial and error methods.
Pages.satilikUrunlerSubtitle: Our highest quality prosthetic hair care and application products
Pages.urun1Desc: 100% natural human hair, breathable special infrastructure.
Pages.urun2Desc: Water and sweat resistant, up to 4 weeks hold.
Pages.urun3Desc: Sulfate-free special formula that nourishes prosthetic hair.
Pages.urun4Desc: Cleans tape residues without damaging the skin.
Pages.urun5Desc: Invisible, transparent matte tape for the front hairline.
Pages.urun6Desc: Prevents tangling and gives natural shine to the hair.
Pages.oncesi1Desc: "Hair loss had started to affect my self-confidence in my business life. Thanks to Uşak Hair Prosthesis, I regained that thick hair of my dreams in a completely natural way."
Pages.oncesi2Desc: "I had a fear that it would be obvious from the outside. But after the application, it was so natural that even my wife didn't notice the difference at first glance. Thank you very much."
Pages.oncesi3Desc: "Female pattern hair loss had deeply affected my psychology. The thinning in my frontal area was covered with a wonderful design. Now I can look in the mirrors smiling."
Pages.oncesi4Desc: "I thought I would have problems when I sweat in training or take a shower. On the contrary, I use it comfortably as if it were my own hair, there is not even the slightest slip."
Pages.yorum1Desc: I started to experience hair loss at an early age. That's why I felt very unhappy. By doing a lot of research, I met Uşak Hair Prosthesis company. I was very satisfied with their quality and service concept. They gave me my hair back.
Pages.yorum2Desc: I am 23 years old. I had been experiencing hair loss for 3 years. I thought of getting a prosthetic hair but I couldn't dare. When I went to the clinic and had a preliminary interview, all my doubts disappeared. I got the hair I dreamed of. I wish I had done it without waiting.
Pages.yorum3Desc: I am someone who has an active and very mobile life. I was experiencing hair problems and my hair was constantly annoying me. My new appearance in the mirror with the application of prosthetic hair made me incredibly happy. I regained my lost self-confidence in a very short time.
Pages.yorum4Desc: The magnificent change in my appearance made me a happier and more positive person in life. Even my stance on the screen has changed. Endless thanks to the Uşak Hair Prosthesis family who provided me with this.
Pages.faqA1: It is an aesthetic and permanent solution obtained by individually processing 100% real human hair onto a breathable, thin infrastructure specially prepared for the areas where the person experiences hair loss.
Pages.faqA2: It was first developed in Hollywood cinema so that actors could quickly take on different roles, and later, thanks to the perfect naturalness it provides, it became an indispensable aesthetic solution for people experiencing hair loss all over the world.
Pages.faqQ3: WHAT IS THE DIFFERENCE FROM A WIG?
Pages.faqA3: A wig is put on your head like a hat and carries the risk of falling off at any time. Prosthetic hair is fixed to your skin with special medical solutions; you can swim with it, do sports, take a shower and feel completely like your own hair. Also, prosthetic hair breathes, wigs do not.
Pages.faqA4: Yes, it is completely healthy. The infrastructures and fixing medical tapes/solutions we use have passed dermatological tests and allow the skin to pass air and water.
Pages.faqA5: Since the infrastructure of the prosthetic hair has air and water permeability, it has been stated by Islamic scholars that it does not pose an obstacle to performing ablution or ghusl ablution from a religious point of view.
Pages.faqA6: Yes, it is fixed using special medical tapes and liquid adhesives that do not harm the skin and have passed dermatological tests. This process is completely painless and safe.
Pages.faqA7: Depending on the selected infrastructure model and the user's habits, the life of a prosthetic hair varies between 1 and 3 years on average.
Pages.faqA8: It needs periodic maintenance just like your own hair. On average, every 3-4 weeks, maintenance must be done in our expert center or at home with your own means, the infrastructure must be cleaned and the tapes must be renewed.
Pages.faqA9: Since prosthetic hair is made from lifeless 100% human hair, it does not grow. Therefore, the first cut and style are very important; our expert stylists design the most suitable model for you. Your own hair underneath continues to grow normally.
Pages.faqA10: Absolutely! You can do professional sports, go to the pool or sea, play football, blow-dry with your prosthetic hair. You will not experience any restrictions.
Pages.faqQ11: COMBING AND STYLING AS I WANT?
Pages.faqA11: Yes, since 100% real human hair is used, you can blow-dry, use a curling iron, gel or wax, and style it by combing it in any direction you want.
Pages.faqQ12: IS PROSTHETIC HAIR SUITABLE FOR CHILDREN?
Pages.faqA12: Yes, we have child prosthetic hair applications suitable for extra sensitive skin, specially produced for our children who are receiving chemotherapy, have alopecia or have lost their hair due to an accident.
